message:
refactor: replace unsafe CStr::from_ptr with bounded scan_c_string

Convert process_abi and dlfcn_abi functions to use scan_c_string for
safer string handling with proper bounds checking:
- execvpe, posix_spawn_impl, posix_spawn_file_actions_addopen/addchdir_np
- dlvsym symbol/version string validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
